common.yearOneReport: Check out our Year-One Landscape report here!

home.heroDescription: 4HERFRIKA is raising world class female leaders at the intersection of business and technology
home.wordsOnStreetSub: Take a look at what our members say!
home.campusDescription: We operate through bite-sized communities in tertiary institutions
home.academyDescription: Online learning platform for skill development
home.ourCampusesDescription: One campus at a time, we're growing a sisterhood. Across 20+ African universities, 4Herfrika chapters host events, workshops, and mentorship sessions — building leadership, community, and connection.
home.ourAcademyDescription: Virtual learning. Real impact. Through our Tech, Business, and Climate Academies, young women gain practical skills, mentorship, and confidence to lead boldly in today's world.

about.aboutDescription: At 4HerFrika, we strive to train, mentor, and empower women to become transformative leaders across Africa.
about.whereEveryGirl: Where Every Girl Achieves Their Goal
about.faqDescription: In this section you can find all the answers you are probably looking for. If you still struggle with finding one - don't hesitate to contact us directly.
about.callForActionTitle: <pink>When you empower one girl</pink>, you uplift an entire community.
about.callForActionDescription: Every donation you make helps us reach more girls and create sustainable change across underserved regions. Together, we're breaking barriers in education, health, and technology.
about.missionDescription: To raise self sufficient leaders from university and high schools across Africa for community impact.
about.visionDescription: We envision 4herfrika in all tertiary institutions across sub saharan Africa and to have impacted 2 million women and girls with tech and entrepreneurship by 2030.

blog.description: This is a safe space created just for you, with experiences of women from all walks of life targeted to help you find your mojo and beauty in this chaos called LIFE

faq.title: FAQs
faq.description: In this section you can find all the answers you are probably looking for
faq.cantFindAnswer: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Please chat to our friendly team.

footer.subscribeDescription: Subscribe to our newsletter for the latest updates and news

careers.title: Career Corner
careers.heroText: Welcome to 'Career Corner', where you can book a 10 mins call with a mentor for free to ask questions
careers.counselingDescription: You can book a 10 mins call with a mentor for free to ask questions.
careers.becomeMentorDescription: Share your purpose for becoming a mentor and take the first step with us
careers.whyMentor: Tell us why you want to become a mentor...
careers.attachFile: Attach file. File size of your documents should not exceed 10MB
careers.receiveUpdates: I would like to receive updates and tips on mentoring from 4HerFrika.
careers.mentorComingSoon: More information about this mentor will be available soon.

donate.title: Support Our Mission
donate.description: Your donation helps us reach more girls and create sustainable change across underserved regions.
donate.thankYou: Thank you for your support. Every contribution helps us make a bigger impact.
donate.heroVision: Our Vision is to impact 2 million women and girls with tech and entrepreneurship by 2030.
donate.donateToEmpower: Donate to Empower Women Across Africa
donate.helpEmpower: Help us Empower Women Across Africa
donate.helpDescription: Your donation funds scholarships, tech training, and mentorship to support and raise world-class women. Our vision is to impact 2,000,000 women and girls with tech and entrepreneurship by 2030.
donate.bankTransferNote: Use the account details below to make your transfer

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.name: Name
contact.successDescription: Thank you for getting in touch. We'll get back to you soon.
contact.errorMessage: Failed to send message. Please check your inputs and try again.

impact.neverTouched: In one year, we've seen girls who never touched a computer now designing products, coding software, and leading change in their schools and communities.
impact.justTheBeginning: This is just the beginning. By 2030, 4herfrika envisions 2 million women and girls empowered across Africa. Together, we can make it happen
impact.whatStarted: What started in a single campus in Nigeria has now spread across 25 campuses in Nigeria, Ghana, Sierra Leone, Kenya, and Cameroon. In just one year, 4herfrika has become a community where girls discover their voices, grow their skills, and prepare to lead Africa's future.

projects.title: Projects
projects.heroTitle: At 4HerFrika, We Believe In Doing, Not Just Dreaming.
projects.heroDescription: Our Projects are grassroots-driven, impact-focused, and designed to uplift girls across Africa through education, technology, and leadership.
projects.introDescription: 4HerAfrika is a movement dedicated to empowering young women across Africa through technology, leadership, and entrepreneurship.
projects.introFullDescription: 4HerAfrika is a movement dedicated to empowering young women across Africa through technology, leadership, and entrepreneurship. We build grassroots-driven programs that equip girls with digital skills, connect them to mentorship, and support them in becoming leaders and changemakers in their communities.
projects.stopTheViolenceDescription: The StopTheViolence project delves into these causes, exploring their effects and potential consequences on students' lives.
projects.techUp4HerDescription: A digital skills bootcamp for girls, from zero knowledge to tech-savvy in UI/UX Design, Web Dev, and Digital Literacy.

notFound.couldntFind: We couldn't find the page you were looking for, but don't worry!
notFound.everyDetour: Every detour is an opportunity to discover something new.
